info.title: Ikea API Pro
info.description:
# 🪑 IKEA API Pro – Real-Time Furniture & Home Decor Data API

🚀 **Power your application with IKEA API Pro!**

Unlock one of the most reliable, comprehensive, and developer-friendly APIs for accessing IKEA product data. Built for speed and scalability, **IKEA API Pro** delivers structured, real-time data for products, categories, stores, and more — perfect for **eCommerce**, **interior design apps**, **retail analytics**, and **market research tools**.

---

## 📅 Last Updated

**March 23, 2026**

## ⚡ Highlights

* 📦 Access to **12,000+ IKEA products**
* 🔄 Real-time product & catalog data
* 🚀 No proxies required
* ⚡ Fast & stable API performance
* 🌍 Multi-country support

---

## 🌐 Useful Links

* 🌍 **Official Website:** [https://happyendpoint.com/](https://happyendpoint.com/)
* 🪑 **IKEA API:** [https://happyendpoint.com/apis/ikea](https://happyendpoint.com/apis/ikea)
* 📘 **Documentation:** [https://happyendpoint.com/apis/ikea/docs/](https://happyendpoint.com/apis/ikea/docs/)
* 🐦 **Twitter:** [https://x.com/happyendpointhq](https://x.com/happyendpointhq)
* 📩 **Contact Email:** [happyendpointhq@gmail.com](mailto:happyendpointhq@gmail.com)

---

## 📦 Custom Data & Scraping Services Available

Need more than what the API provides?

We offer **custom IKEA data scraping and bulk datasets** tailored to your needs:

* 📊 Large-scale product datasets (CSV / Excel ready)
* 🛍️ Full catalog extraction
* 📈 Pricing & availability tracking
* 🤖 AI training datasets
* 🔧 Custom scraping solutions

📩 Contact us for custom data:
👉 **[happyendpointhq@gmail.com](mailto:happyendpointhq@gmail.com)**

---

## 🧩 API Features

Our API is structured into four powerful feature sets, giving you flexibility and scalability as your application grows:

### 📊 Feature 1: Foundational Data

* Access supported **countries**
* Retrieve IKEA **store locations**
* Explore the full **category tree**

---

### 🔎 Feature 2: Keyword-Based Product Search

* Search products using keywords
* Apply advanced filters for precision
* Ideal for building search engines & discovery tools

---

### 🗂️ Feature 3: Full Category Browsing

* Browse products by category
* Navigate catalog like IKEA’s website
* Includes category-based filters

---

### 📦 Feature 4: Rich Product Details

* High-resolution images
* Pricing & availability
* Dimensions & materials
* Product specifications & metadata

---

## 🔧 Core Endpoints

* 🔎 `search by keyword` – Find products instantly
* 🗂️ `search by category` – Browse catalog by category
* 🎯 `filters` – Refine search results
* 📦 `product details` – Get detailed product data
* 🏬 `stores` – Retrieve store location data
* 🌍 `countries` – Supported regions & localization

---

## 🎯 What Can You Build?

* 🛒 E-commerce & affiliate storefronts
* 🏡 Interior design & mood board apps
* 📊 Price comparison & tracking tools
* 📦 Inventory & stock monitoring systems
* 🧠 AI-powered furniture recommendation engines
* 🛍️ Dropshipping & catalog automation platforms

---

## 💡 Why Choose IKEA API Pro?

* ⚡ **High-speed, low-latency API**
* 🔄 **Real-time IKEA catalog data**
* 🌍 **Global coverage with multi-region support**
* 🧩 **Easy REST integration with clean JSON**
* 🔒 **Reliable infrastructure & stable endpoints**
* 👨‍💻 Built for developers by **HappyEndpoint**

---

## 🚀 Free Plan Available

To help you get started, we offer a **Free Basic Plan**:

* 🎁 **500 requests/month**
* 🔓 Access to all endpoints
* 🧪 Perfect for testing & prototyping

Upgrade anytime as your usage scales.

---

## 📈 Ideal For

* 🛍️ E-commerce & retail platforms
* 🏡 Home decor & furniture apps
* 📊 Market research & analytics tools
* 🤖 AI & recommendation engines
* 📦 Inventory & catalog systems

---

## 🔎 SEO Keywords

IKEA API, furniture API, home decor API, IKEA product API, IKEA scraper, IKEA data API, furniture data API, home goods API, retail product API, product catalog API, eCommerce furniture API, interior design API, IKEA price API, IKEA stock API, furniture dataset API, home decor dataset, product search API, retail data API, IKEA catalog API, IKEA scraping API, price tracking furniture API, dropshipping furniture API, home furnishing API, shopping API, RapidAPI IKEA API, HappyEndpoint API, furniture analytics API, product details API, catalog browsing API, global retail API

---

## ⚠️ Disclaimer

This is an independent API built by HappyEndpoint. It is **not affiliated with, endorsed, or sponsored by IKEA**. All data is sourced from publicly available information.

---

## 🚀 Get Started

Start building powerful furniture and home decor applications with **IKEA API Pro** today.

🪑 Build smarter apps
📊 Unlock retail insights
⚡ Scale without limits
info.termsOfService: The best unofficial real time Ikea Data API

typeName.description: Product type name or short description

url.description: URL to the main product page

currentPrice.description: The price as a numerical value

formattedPrice.description: The price formatted as a string

main.description: URL of the main product image

contextual.description: URL of the contextual (in-room) product image

all.description: List of all available product images

designText.description: Main design description (e.g., color, material). Can be null.

isOnlineSellable.description: Indicates if the product can be purchased online

url.description: URL to the product variant page

designText.description: Variant description (e.g., color, material). Can be null.

currentPrice.description: The price as a numerical value

formattedPrice.description: The price formatted as a string

variants.description: List of available product variants (e.g., different colors)

start.description: The starting index of the returned products in the full list.

end.description: The ending index of the returned products in the full list.

total.description: The total number of products available for this query.

message.example: Invalid request: Keyword is required and must be a non-empty string
Internal server error. Please try again later.
IKEA product search service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.

name.description: The name of the sort functionality.

parameter.description: The query parameter name to use for sorting.

id.description: The value to use in the 'sortOrder' query parameter.

name.description: The human-readable name for the sort option.

sortOrders.description: Available sorting options for the search query.

name.description: The display name of the filter group.

parameter.description: The parameter ID to use in the 'filters' query.

id.description: The value to use in the 'filters' query parameter.

name.description: The human-readable name for the filter option.

filters.description: Available filters to refine the search query.

message.example: The requested resource was not found for the specified country. Please verify your inputs.

name.description: The name of the current category.

key.description: The unique key for the current category.

url.description: The direct URL to this category page on IKEA's website.

parentKeys.description: An array of keys for the parent categories.

name.description: The name of the sort functionality.

parameter.description: The query parameter name to use for sorting.

id.description: The value to use in the 'sortOrder' query parameter.

name.description: The human-readable name for the sort option.

sortOrders.description: Available sorting options for the search query.

name.description: The display name of the filter group.

parameter.description: The parameter ID to use in the 'filters' query.

id.description: The value to use in the 'filters' query parameter.

name.description: The human-readable name for the filter option.

filters.description: Available filters to refine the search query.

example: This wide dresser gives you plenty of storage space...

assemblyInstructionGuide.description: Direct URL to the product's assembly instruction PDF.

gallery.description: List of product images and videos.

variants.description: List of product variations (e.g., different colors or materials).

packaging.description: Details about the product's packaging for transport.

reviewInfo.example: Average rating of 4.1 out of 5 stars from 177 reviews.

ratingValue.description: The star rating given by the reviewer.

text.description: The main body of the review text.
text.example: This was very easy to put together and it looks great. Very sturdy.

highlightedReviews.description: A list of featured customer reviews.

id.description: The unique identifier for the category.

name.description: The display name of the category.

url.description: The full URL to the category page on IKEA's website.

imageUrl.description: URL for the category's representative image.

categories.description: A flat list of all available IKEA product categories and sub-categories.

countryURL.description: The URL of the IKEA site for the country/region.

countryISOCode.description: The 3 digit ISO code  of the country/region.

languageCode.description: The two-letter code for the language.

url.description: The direct URL to the IKEA site for this language.

sites.description: A list of available language-specific sites for this country.

countries.description: A list of all countries/regions where IKEA has a presence.

storeId.description: The unique identifier for the IKEA store.

name.description: The full official name of the store.

lat.description: The latitude coordinate of the store.

lng.description: The longitude coordinate of the store.

displayName.description: A shorter, more user-friendly display name.

storePageUrl.description: The URL to the store's official page on the IKEA website.

displayAddress.example: 400 South Baldwin Ave Suite D5, Arcadia

code.description: The classification code for the store type.

name.description: The classification name for the store type.

stores.description: A list of IKEA stores for the specified country.

get.description: Returns the health status of the Semrush API service including system metrics and processing time

get.summary: Search products by keyword on Ikea
get.description: Search for products on Ikea using keywords. Provide a search query to get product results including prices, availability, and product details.

schema.description:
- Search keyword for IKEA products
- Examples: `table`, `chair`, `sofa`, `desk`, `bed`, `storage`

parameters.description:
- Search keyword for IKEA products
- Examples: `table`, `chair`, `sofa`, `desk`, `bed`, `storage`
parameters.name: keyword

schema.description:
- Two-letter country code
- Get available country codes from `/countries` endpoint
- Examples: `us` (United States), `ca` (Canada), `gb` (United Kingdom), `ch` (Switzerland), `se` (Sweden), `de` (Germany)

parameters.description:
- Two-letter country code
- Get available country codes from `/countries` endpoint
- Examples: `us` (United States), `ca` (Canada), `gb` (United Kingdom), `ch` (Switzerland), `se` (Sweden), `de` (Germany)
parameters.name: countryCode

schema.description:
- Two-letter language code
- Get available language codes from `/countries` endpoint
- Examples: `en` (English), `fr` (French), `de` (German), `it` (Italian), `sv` (Swedish)
- Note: `ca` supports `en` or `fr`, `ch` supports `de`, `fr`, `it`, or `en`

parameters.description:
- Two-letter language code
- Get available language codes from `/countries` endpoint
- Examples: `en` (English), `fr` (French), `de` (German), `it` (Italian), `sv` (Swedish)
- Note: `ca` supports `en` or `fr`, `ch` supports `de`, `fr`, `it`, or `en`
parameters.name: languageCode

schema.description:
- Page number for pagination (default page size: 24)
- Examples: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`

parameters.description:
- Page number for pagination (default page size: 24)
- Examples: `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`
parameters.name: page

schema.description:
- Filters in format: parameterId=valueId,parameterId=valueId
- Get Filters from "product-search-by-keyword-filters"
- Example: `f-measurement-buckets=WIDTH_0_26,f-measurement-buckets=WIDTH_26_28,f-type=chair,f-type=desk`

parameters.description:
- Filters in format: parameterId=valueId,parameterId=valueId
- Get Filters from "product-search-by-keyword-filters"
- Example: `f-measurement-buckets=WIDTH_0_26,f-measurement-buckets=WIDTH_26_28,f-type=chair,f-type=desk`
parameters.name: filters

schema.description:
- Sort order for results (default: RELEVANCE)
- Options: `RELEVANCE`, `PRICE_LOW_TO_HIGH`, `PRICE_HIGH_TO_LOW`, `NEWEST`, `RATING`, `NAME_ASCENDING`, `MOST_POPULAR`

parameters.description:
- Sort order for results (default: RELEVANCE)
- Options: `RELEVANCE`, `PRICE_LOW_TO_HIGH`, `PRICE_HIGH_TO_LOW`, `NEWEST`, `RATING`, `NAME_ASCENDING`, `MOST_POPULAR`
parameters.name: sortOrder

200.description: Successful response with IKEA product search results

schema.description:
